name: Tex-Mex Chicken and Rice
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Boneless, skinless chicken-breast, cut into 1/2-inch chunks
1 can Red kidney beans, rinsed and drained (15 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart casserole, combine oil, chili powder, garlic powder, cumin, cinnamon, and salt. Microwave, uncovered, for 30-60 seconds, or until all spices are fragrant.
2. Add rice; stir until coated. Add broth, water, and raisins; cover with lid or vented plastic wrap.
3. Microwave on high for 8 minutes; then microwave on medium-low (30%) for 12-14 minutes, or until rice is tender.
4. Stir in chicken, beans, and peas. Recover and microwave on high for 5-7 minutes, or until chicken is no longer pink and the liquid is absorbed. Serve immediately.
